allow: Bash(cd E:/jesal/order-management && npx prisma db push 2>&1)
Bash(cd E:/jesal/order-management && npx prisma db push 2>&1 && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts 2>&1)
Bash(cd E:/jesal/order-management && npx kill-port 3000 3001 3002 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "next" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; rm -rf .next; true)
Bash(curl -s -b /tmp/cookies2.txt http://localhost:3000/dashboard 2>&1 | grep -oE 'error|Error|Something went wrong|NEXT_NOT_FOUND' | head -5)
Bash(cd E:/jesal/order-management && rm -rf .next && npm run build 2>&1)
Bash(tasklist | grep -i node 2>/dev/null || tasklist | findstr /i node 2>/dev/null)

Bash(cd E:/jesal/order-management && node -e "const { Kanban, List, GripVertical, Calendar, DollarSign } = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\('All icons exist:', !!Kanban, !!List, !!GripVertical, !!Calendar, !!DollarSign\)")
Bash(cd E:/jesal/order-management && node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\('Kanban:', typeof l.Kanban, 'List:', typeof l.List, 'GripVertical:', typeof l.GripVertical\)")

Bash(cd E:/jesal/order-management && node -e "import\('lucide-react'\).then\(m => console.log\('Kanban:', typeof m.Kanban, 'List:', typeof m.List, 'GripVertical:', typeof m.GripVertical, 'Kanban2:', typeof m.Kanban\)\)")

Bash(cd E:/jesal/order-management && node -e "import\('./src/lib/prisma.js'\).catch\(\(\) => {}\); import\('@prisma/client'\).then\(\({PrismaClient}\) => { const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.user.findMany\({select:{id:true,name:true,username:true}}\).then\(u => { console.log\(JSON.stringify\(u\)\); p.\\$disconnect\(\) }\) }\)")

Bash(cd E:/jesal/order-management && node -e "const {PrismaClient} = require\('@prisma/client'\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.order.findMany\({select:{id:true,orderNumber:true,createdById:true}}\).then\(u => { console.log\(JSON.stringify\(u,null,2\)\); process.exit\(\) }\)")
Bash(cd E:/jesal/order-management && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/orders/kanban && curl -s -o /dev/null -w " %{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/orders)
Bash(cd E:/jesal/order-management && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "orders:%{http_code} " http://localhost:3000/orders && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "kanban:%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/orders/kanban)

Bash(cd E:/jesal/order-management && node -e "const {PrismaClient} = require\('@prisma/client'\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.orderStatus.createMany\({ data: [ { key: 'DRAFT', label: 'Draft', color: 'slate', sortOrder: 0, isDefault: true }, { key: 'CONFIRMED', label: 'Confirmed', color: 'blue', sortOrder: 1 }, { key: 'IN_PROGRESS', label: 'In Progress', color: 'amber', sortOrder: 2 }, { key: 'COMPLETED', label: 'Completed', color: 'emerald', sortOrder: 3 }, { key: 'CANCELLED', label: 'Cancelled', color: 'rose', sortOrder: 4 } ] }\).then\(r => { console.log\('Seeded', r.count, 'statuses'\); process.exit\(\) }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\) }\)")
